note: Structured squad feed for demo. Set API_FOOTBALL_KEY and run scripts/refresh_live_squad.py to pull live injuries.

Spain.injury_summary: Spain enter the summer window with one key midfield doubt but a largely fit core for the expanded squad.

injuries.detail: ACL recovery — not expected for opening group matches
Muscle fatigue — managed minutes in recent camps

Portugal.injury_summary: Portugal list is strong; minor knocks to wide options but Ronaldo-led attack intact.

injuries.detail: Season-ending knee injury — ruled out of tournament
Hamstring tightness — expected to train fully before R16

France.injury_summary: France monitoring defensive depth; attack remains at full strength.

injuries.detail: Cleared after mask protocol — no restrictions
Ankle knock — full training resumed

England.injury_summary: England carry minor doubts in midfield but key forwards available.

injuries.detail: No issues reported in camp
Shoulder knock — expected to start opener

injuries.detail: Full participant in tactical sessions

Brazil.injury_summary: Brazil without one senior wide option; Vinicius Jr leads the left flank.

injuries.detail: Building minutes after long layoff — role may be limited early

injuries.detail: Load management — expected to play key knockout minutes
Muscle injury — replaced in squad

Knee surgery — not in squad
